generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlHVACActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC system actuators modeled within BIM for real-time control of temperature, humidity, and ventilation in building zones"
]

instance BuildingControlLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Automated lighting actuators controlled via BIM-enriched models for adaptive lighting systems with tenant-specific configurations"
]

instance BuildingControlAutomatedDoorsActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Automated door actuators integrated with BIM models for occupancy-based opening/closing control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SmartThermostatControlData
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded occupancy sensors in building zones feeding real-time presence data to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature/humidity sensors distributed across building zones capturing operational conditions for DT synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meters measuring real-time consumption data from HVAC, lighting, and other systems for predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance SmartThermostat : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart thermostats with BIM-enriched metadata for adaptive climate control integration with DT services"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SmartThermostatDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance SmartThermostatDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SmartThermostat
]

// C5: Data Streams
instance RealTimeOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streams captured at 1-second intervals for DT occupancy prediction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature/humidity data streams with 5-second sampling intervals for HVAC control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyUsageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data streams aggregated by building zone for predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance SmartThermostatControlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control signals from smart thermostats for adaptive climate management in BIM-enriched zones"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SmartThermostatDataTransmitted
]

// C6: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Complete BIM model enriched with device-level metadata (sensors/actuators) for runtime extraction of control logic"
]

instance RuntimeHVACModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven runtime artifact for HVAC system simulation and optimization generated via MDE transformations"
]

instance BIMDeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Metadata model containing sensor/actuator configurations, tenant IDs, and endpoint addresses extracted from BIM"
]

// C10: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts (service interfaces, visualization scripts)"
]

instance EclipseHonoPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time IoT middleware enabling bidirectional data exchange between physical devices and Digital Twin"
]

instance DittoPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized DT platform for service orchestration and extensibility"
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich interactive visualization environment for DT monitoring and simulation with immersive 3D interfaces"
]

instance RevitBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tool used by Building Control Engineers to model devices and control logic in building infrastructure"
]

// C11: Services
instance DataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time bidirectional data synchronization between physical building components and DT via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOccupancyInsight, RealTimeTemperatureInsight
]

instance ControlSignalService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated control signal generation for actuators (lighting, HVAC) based on DT state and BIM-enriched logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACControlAction, LightingControlAction
]

instance ServiceOrchestrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Platform service managing DT service lifecycle and extensibility through standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomPluginIntegrationService
]

instance InteractiveDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine-based interactive dashboard for real-time monitoring and stakeholder collaboration"
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityManagerDashboard, TenantControlInterface
]

instance CustomPluginIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extension service enabling domain-specific plugins (e.g., reinforcement learning) for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReinforcementLearningControlPlugin, FaultDetectionPlugin
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeOccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy prediction and anomaly detection based on sensor data streams for space utilization optimization"
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature/humidity monitoring with predictive maintenance alerts for HVAC system efficiency"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption forecasting across building zones using historical and real-time data"
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC control adjustments based on DT state and occupancy patterns (IsAutomatic: true)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control based on occupancy and daylight availability (IsAutomatic: true)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlPlugin : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive control plugin using reinforcement learning for optimal HVAC/lighting operation (IsAutomatic: true)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionPlugin : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "AI-based fault detection system for predictive maintenance in building systems (IsAutomatic: true)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FacilityManagerDashboard : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard for Facility Managers to monitor and adjust building operations in real-time (IsAutomatic: false)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TenantControlInterface : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User interface for tenants to control personal lighting/ventilation preferences via DT (IsAutomatic: false)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Environment and Component Relationships
instance BuildingZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, EnergyConsumptionMeter,
        BuildingControlHVACActuator, BuildingControlLightingActuator,
        RealTimeOccupancyData, RealTimeTemperatureData, EnergyUsageData
]

instance BuildingControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingControlAutomatedDoorsActuator,
        SmartThermostat, SmartThermostatControlData,
        ReinforcementLearningControlPlugin, FaultDetectionPlugin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal transmission** from the DT to physical actuators via standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework generates runtime interfaces that process DT-generated commands (e.g., lighting control, HVAC adjustments) and execute them on physical devices, enabling closed-loop operation and adaptive control strategies (e.g., reinforcement learning-based optimization in BOREALIS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time scale**, with data synchronization rates determined by sensor sampling frequencies (e.g., 1-second updates for occupancy sensors, 5-second updates for energy meters). The framework ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** (≤100ms) via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for live DT-to-physical system synchronization, supporting adaptive control loops and predictive maintenance."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **modular, service-oriented DT ecosystem** where:
  - **BIM models** serve as the central semantic foundation, linking physical assets to DT services.
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware** enables real-time data synchronization between physical devices and DT components.
  - **Unreal Engine** provides an immersive visualization layer for stakeholder interaction.
  - **Standardized extension points** allow DT Engineers to integrate custom services (e.g., analytics, control algorithms) without disrupting the core architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the **entire building life cycle**, from:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models enriched with device metadata for initial DT setup.
  - **Construction phase**: Automated extraction of physical asset data for integration into the DT.
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization via DT services (e.g., adaptive lighting in BOREALIS).
  The DT represents the physical counterpart as **operated**, ensuring alignment with real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity and validity** through:
  - **Verification/Validation**: The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric evaluates the DT’s alignment with the physical system, measuring interoperability and architectural soundness.
  - **Uncertainty management**: BIM models are validated for consistency with physical asset specifications (e.g., sensor accuracy, control logic correctness).
  - **Continuous synchronization**: Real-time data streams (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) minimize drift between virtual and physical representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Established via:
  - **Network protocols**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto support MQTT and WebSocket for low-latency bidirectional communication.
  - **Middleware architecture**: Couples BIM models with IoT devices through standardized endpoints (e.g., tenant/device IDs) for seamless data exchange."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with:
  - **Modular architecture**: Extension points allow integration of custom services (e.g., analytics, control algorithms) without redeployment.
  - **Cloud/edge deployment**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enables distributed hosting for real-time data processing.
  - **Unreal Engine integration**: Visualization components are deployed as interactive web applications or standalone apps."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables integration with:
  - **External BIM systems**: Standardized extension points allow compatibility with other BIM tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD).
  - **IoT platforms**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto supports interoperability with third-party sensor networks.
  - **Analytics tools**: Custom services can interface with external platforms (e.g., cloud-based optimization engines)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to follow:
  - **Physical asset ownership**: Data generated by sensors/actuators is owned by the building owner (PT owner).
  - **DT service provider ownership**: Custom services (e.g., analytics plugins) may retain metadata for operational purposes, adhering to privacy policies (e.g., GDPR compliance)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to:
  - **BIM standards**: IFC (Industry Foundation Classes) for semantic interoperability between BIM models and DT components.
  - **IoT middleware standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: Standardized extension points for modular DT development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Ensures safety through:
  - **Remote operation controls**: DT services can execute commands on physical devices remotely, but with safeguards to prevent unauthorized access (e.g., role-based authentication).
  - **Cybersecurity protocols**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) supports encryption and access control for data integrity.
  - **Human-in-the-loop**: Facility Managers interact with the DT to validate critical decisions (e.g., emergency shutdowns)."
]
